script_text: Here is a helpful trick about vowels.
voice_direction: Warm calm kindergarten teacher voice. Natural pacing.

script_text: Every single word must have at least one vowel! A, E, I, O, U.
voice_direction: Warm calm kindergarten teacher voice. Natural pacing.

script_text: That is why these five letters are super important. Every word needs one!
voice_direction: Warm calm kindergarten teacher voice. Natural pacing.
